data.name: MinimumSecurityLevelExceeded
data.value: Minimum security level not achieved!

data.name: MaximumSecurityLevelExceeded
data.value: Maximum security level exceeded!

data.name: MinNumberOfSharesLowerThanTwo
data.value: The minimum number of shares is lower than 2! Please set the minimum number of shares to 2 or higher.

data.name: FinitePointsNotDistinct
data.value: Finite points (aka shares) are not distinct!

data.name: MaxSharesLowerThanMinShares
data.value: The pool secret would be irrecoverable, if you use these parameters, because the maximum number of shares is lower than the minimum number of shares.

data.name: ReadOnlyCollection
data.value: The {0} collection is read-only.

data.name: StartArrayIndexNegative
data.value: The starting array index cannot be negative.

data.name: DestinationArrayHasFewerElements
data.value: The destination array has fewer elements than the collection.

data.name: InvalidArrayTypeCast
data.value: Parameter {0}: Cannot convert an array of type {1} to an array of type {2}.

data.name: EmptyCollection
data.value: Value cannot be an empty collection.

data.name: ValueLowerThanX
data.value: Value cannot be lower than {0}.

data.name: DataTypeNotSupported
data.value: Data Type '{0}' not supported!

data.name: NoMaximumY
data.value: Unexpected error. The largest Y coordinate could not be determined. Please check the shares.

data.name: NoValidMersennePrimeExponentAvailable
data.value: No valid Mersenne prime exponent >= {0} available.

data.name: InverseOfZeroDoesNotExist
data.value: Inverse of 0 does not exist.

data.name: DenominatorIsNotInvertibleModuloPrime
data.value: Denominator is not invertible modulo prime (gcd != 1). Check that all computations are performed in GF(p) with a prime modulus.

data.name: ShareIndexMustBePositive
data.value: Share index must be a positive integer greater than zero.

data.name: ShareStringCannotBeEmpty
data.value: Share string cannot be empty.

data.name: ShareIndexAndValueMustBeNonEmpty
data.value: Invalid share format. Both index and value parts must be non-empty.

data.name: HexStringMustBeEven
data.value: Hex string must have even length

data.name: InvalidHexCharacter
data.value: Invalid hex character at position {0}

data.name: InvalidShareFormat
data.value: Invalid share format. Expected format: 'X{0}Y' where X and Y are hexadecimal values.

data.name: LengthOutOfRangeForCapacity
data.value: Length must be non-negative and less than or equal to the capacity of the array.

data.name: IndexOutOfRangeForLength
data.value: Index must be non-negative and less than the length of the array.

data.name: ArgumentMustBeArrayButWasX
data.value: Argument must be an Array, but was {0}.

data.name: ArgumentArrayLengthMismatch
data.value: Argument must be an Array of the same length, but was {0} instead of {1}.

data.name: CountedComparerRequiredForCompare
data.value: A counted comparer is required. Use '{0}' to specify the number of elements to compare.

data.name: CountedComparerRequiredForHash
data.value: A counted comparer is required. Use '{0}' to specify the number of elements to hash.

data.name: CountExceedsBothArrayLengths
data.value: Count '{0}' exceeds one of the array lengths ({1}, {2}).

data.name: CountExceedsArrayLength
data.value: Count '{0}' exceeds the array length ({1}).
